--nofixz'Prevent a transformation from being runz
--list-fixesz

--print-functionz0Modify the grammar so that print() is a functionz
--exec-functionz/Modify the grammar so that exec() is a functionz
-vz	--verbosez

--no-diffsz#Don't show diffs of the refactoringz
--writez

--nobackupsFz&Don't write backups for modified filesz

strr
zXPut output files in this directory instead of overwriting the input files.  Requires -n.)
--write-unchanged-fileszYAlso write files even if no changes were required (useful with --output-dir); implies -w.z
--add-suffixzuAppend this string to all output filenames. Requires -n if non-empty.  ex: --add-suffix='3' will generate .py3 files.T
write_unchanged_filesz&--write-unchanged-files/-W implies -w.z%Can't use --output-dir/-o without -n.z"Can't use --add-suffix without -n.z@not writing files and not printing diffs; that's not very usefulz
